name: Dark Latex Bathrooms
description:
TW : Noncon, Rape

You know the drill

You've waken up in a mysterious laboratory which is as tall as a skyscraper, with your only way out being down, or in your case, through hallways, corridors, rooms, vents and various areas of this forbidden, abandoned place, the catch is, there are monsters, creatures made of thick goo known as latex beasts.

You're not quite sure how these creatures came to be, but one thing is blaringly clear, they want you, for what? You don't plan on finding out. (Or maybe you do if that's your kink)

This was kind of a random idea I had while just scrolling through the changed wiki, like, you enter the bathrooms and see what happens, I feel like it's obligatory to put the trigger warning just because the dark latex beasts in there... presumably at least, do rape you.

Also, I've been thinking about making a sort of changed world rpg bot, but I'm not sure how I'd do it, because I'm fine with typing down every single thing inside of changed to the bot, the problem is not overloading it with information because I don't think janitor LLM can take all of that. Regardless, if you guys wanna see it, then I'll do it.
creator: Veyl
